start.speaker: Elder Thom
start.text: Ah, young one. Dark times have come to our village. Goblins have taken over the cave in the Whispering Woods.

explain.speaker: Elder Thom
explain.text: You must venture through the forest and clear the cave. It will not be easy, but I believe in you. Take this blade.

encourage.speaker: Elder Thom
encourage.text: Dangerous indeed, but you have the heart of a hero. The village needs you. Will you help us?

farewell.speaker: Elder Thom
farewell.text: May the old gods watch over you. Speak to Brynn if you need supplies.

start.speaker: Elder Thom
start.text: You've made it through the forest once. The creatures there grow bolder. Be sure to stock up before you venture into the cave.

start.speaker: Elder Thom
start.text: You've been inside the caves... I can see it in your eyes. The goblin chief lurks on the lowest floor. Defeat him and our village will be safe.

start.speaker: Elder Thom
start.text: You did it! The goblin chief is no more. The village owes you everything, hero. Rest well — you've earned it.

start.speaker: Mother
start.text: Be careful out there, dear. I packed you some herbs for the road.

end.speaker: Mother
end.text: Come home safe. I'll be waiting.

start.speaker: Mother
start.text: I heard the wolves howling last night. Please be careful in those woods, dear.

start.speaker: Mother
start.text: The caves? Oh my... just promise me you'll come back. Here, take this.

start.speaker: Mother
start.text: My brave child... I'm so proud of you. Welcome home.

start.speaker: Brynn
start.text: Welcome! I've got potions and gear. What do you need?

shop.speaker: Brynn
shop.text: Take your time. Good gear keeps you alive!

start.speaker: Brynn
start.text: Back from the caves? You'll want better gear for the deeper floors. I've got some new stock.

shop.speaker: Brynn
shop.text: The chain mail is worth every coin if you're heading deeper.

start.speaker: Kael
start.text: Hey! I heard Elder Thom gave you a mission. That's so cool! I wish I could come with you.

next_time.speaker: Kael
next_time.text: You bet! Bring me back a goblin tooth as a souvenir!

nervous.speaker: Kael
nervous.text: Don't worry, you've always been the brave one. Besides, I heard the forest herbs can patch you up in a pinch!

start.speaker: Kael
start.text: You fought wolves AND boars?! That's amazing! Did you find anything cool out there?

start.speaker: Kael
start.text: Wait, you went into the CAVE? With the goblins?! You're insane! ...in a good way. Be careful down there!

start.speaker: Kael
start.text: You beat the goblin chief!! Everyone's talking about it! You're a legend! Can I tell everyone we're best friends?
